title: NESO Electricity Capacity Report 2025: findings of the Panel of Technical Experts
body: "This document is produced by the Panel of Technical Experts:   provides independent scrutiny of the analysis in National Energy System Operator (NESO)’s annual Electricity Capacity Report assists the DESNZ Secretary of State to set the parameters for the Capacity Market auctions for the T-1 auction for delivery year 2026 to 2027, and the T-4 auction for delivery year 2029 to 2030   NESO published their Electricity Capacity Report 2025 (ECR) on 15 July 2025.  "
